summary: Completed end-to-end testing of BIBI Cars Blog feature. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend public blog pages render real seeded data with correct layout (476px card heights). Single article pages scroll to top on navigation and display all required elements (breadcrumb, title, meta, cover, body, related articles, CTA buttons). Admin blog editor with TipTap rich-text editor renders correctly with all formatting buttons (Bold, Italic, Lists, Link). Login flows work for all roles (admin, manager, team_lead).
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@bibi.cars) returns 200 + access_token
Backend: Manager login (manager@bibi.cars) returns 200 + access_token
Backend: Team lead login (teamlead@bibi.cars) returns 200 + access_token
Backend: GET /api/public/blog/articles returns 200 with 8 articles
Backend: Articles have 'tags' as array
Backend: Articles have 'read_time_minutes'
Backend: Articles have 'published_at' in ISO format
Backend: No placeholder articles (all real seeded content)
Backend: GET /api/public/blog/articles?tag=copart returns 1 article
Backend: Article contains 'copart' in tags array
Backend: GET /api/public/blog/articles/{slug}?lang=bg returns Bulgarian (Cyrillic) title
Backend: GET /api/admin/blog/articles without token returns 401
Backend: Manager gets 403 on admin blog endpoint
Backend: Team lead gets 403 on admin blog endpoint
Backend: Admin gets 200 on admin blog endpoint
Backend: POST /api/admin/blog/articles creates article with tags array
Backend: GET created article returns 200
Frontend: Public /blog page loads with real data
Frontend: Latest grid cards have correct 476px height
Frontend: Featured main card exists with correct 476px height
Frontend: Clicking blog card navigates to /blog/:slug
Frontend: Single article page scrolls to top (window.scrollY = 0)
Frontend: H1 title visible in initial viewport
Frontend: Breadcrumb contains HOME / BLOG / Title
Frontend: Category pill found
Frontend: Date + read time found
Frontend: Cover image found
Frontend: Article body content found
Frontend: Related articles section found (4 articles)
Frontend: CTA Primary button 'REQUEST A VEHICLE' found
Frontend: CTA Secondary button 'USE OUR CALCULATOR' found
Frontend: Admin login flow works
Frontend: Admin panel 'Blog Articles' tab found
Frontend: Admin can create new article
Frontend: TipTap rich-text editor renders
Frontend: TipTap Bold button found
Frontend: TipTap Italic button found
Frontend: TipTap List button found
Frontend: TipTap Link button found
Frontend: TipTap editor accepts text input
